app.title: Lingo Policy Explorer
app.subtitle: Simple dashboard to embed PDFs, compare state policies, explore city data, and run RAG queries.
section.embed.title: Embed PDFs
section.embed.description: Upload policy PDFs and send them to the embedding pipeline.
section.policy.title: Compare state policies
section.policy.description: Select two states and describe what you want to compare.
section.geo.title: City / point data
section.geo.description: Look up information for a specific state and city.
section.rag.title: RAG Q&A (streamed)
section.rag.description: Ask a question and stream an answer from the RAG system.
